sanitized_notes_text: Retrieval practice improves later recall when learners attempt to retrieve before restudying.
pdf_as_text: The classroom study reported better delayed recall after repeated retrieval sessions than after repeated reading.

answer.answer: Retrieval practice is supported as a way to improve delayed recall in the supplied sources.

evidence.text: Retrieval practice improves later recall when learners attempt to retrieve before restudying.
The classroom study reported better delayed recall after repeated retrieval sessions than after repeated reading.

answer.answer: The supplied material does not establish that retrieval practice always improves every subject.
